form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Pakenham 0 - 62 January 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Olivia Rose with 58.5kg at $9. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len Wangaratta Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1170m defeating Lil Orlov carrying 58kg at $4. Expecting a bold return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start, shifted in. Near the 700m shifted in and taken Holler Dash in.

form.formComment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. Last start second last of 10 at Berrigan Bm58 on March 14 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Alternate carrying 60kg at $2.70. The race before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 11 at Wangaratta Bm66 on February 28 over 1170m, 2.75 len behind Greatham Boy carrying 57kg at $7.50. Looks tested again this line-up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran on from midfield and won by 1.0 len at Towong Mdn-Sw March 7 over 1200m in soft going defeating Tara's Crown carrying 59.5kg at $15. Second run from a spell 5th of 11 at Yarra Valley Cg&E Bm56 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 1.75 len behind Got Out The Fence carrying 61.5kg at $7.50. Disappointing last time, but will go better with the extra fitness.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 11 at Kyneton Bm56 on March 28 over 1108m, slow going 2.75 len behind Antisocial carrying 61kg at $3.90. The run before that sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 12 at Kyneton Bm56 on March 13 over 1206m, nose behind Drone Attack carrying 61kg at $5. Top chance on his best form.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 8th of 11 at Kyneton Bm56 on March 28 over 1108m, slow going 6 len behind Antisocial carrying 60.5kg at $3.20. Previously second-up 8th of 14 at Bendigo Bm64 on August 14 over 1300m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Ti Tree Lad with 58kg at $5.50. Rates well and can do much better this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran last of 7 at Yarra Valley Bm62 on March 15 over 1200m, 10 len behind Superset carrying 54kg at $101. Second-up second last in a small field at Carrathool Bm50 on March 28 over 1200m, 8 len behind Wagunda with 57.5kg at $11. Will not find this easy. Must improve off a last-start fifth over 1200m at Carrathool to feature in the finish.
